element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns LMBS real-time control with main character
Learning computer-controlled ally management in LMBS
Spell selection via pause menu, resource management
Summon system unlocked after spirit defeats; magical rings mechanic
Broomstick weapon-spell hybrid, expanded party positioning in LMBS
World structure shifts; gathering past allies to prevent Dhaos resurrection
Button assignment shortcuts for combination attacks

typical_tension_triggers: Wide two-dimensional battle terrain requiring horizontal scrolling navigation
Boss encounters with extended screen-width arenas
Time travel transitions between past/present worlds
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Story-driven with alternating safe progression and escalating combat challenges; time travel mechanic provides structural pacing shifts

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-friendly introduction to LMBS with hometown destruction establishing vengeance motivation; single character control ramping
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Party expansion increases tactical depth; introduction of spell economy and summoning systems; time travel structure begins
difficulty_curve.late_game: Multi-party member coordination required; past-world gathering quests with higher combat stakes; Dhaos confrontation setup
notable_spikes: Time travel first activation (mechanical complexity spike)
Boss encounters requiring full party ability coordination

notable_level_patterns.description: Battle terrain stretches wider than single screen; left-right scrolling based on character/opponent positioning in LMBS
Party member recruitment tied to narrative advancement; each join point relieves tension with new abilities and resets difficulty expectation
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Chester join (archer ranged), Mint join (healing), Claus join (summoning)

notable_level_patterns.description: Chronological navigation between past and present world states; backtracking across timelines to gather allies for Dhaos prevention
